creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
> I don't know the etiquette or policy about this, but the patches that
 > would be sent the attic by my suggestion are tiny:
 > 
 > -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   251 Feb 21 08:57 patch-ab
 > -rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel   226 Feb 21 08:57 patch-ac
 
 According to the Handbook, Things that can say as policy about 
 makeing patch is "One patch per file". 
 
 But it seems a fact that almost ports follow "One file per patch" 
 as an etiquette. I guess it's more easy to maintain ports stuff.
 
 
 -- 
 KATO Tsuguru / tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
                
 Sent by Japanese ProntoMail
